behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names both files (slime/rollout/data_source.py, slime/ray/rollout.py), the class (RolloutDataSource), and mentions the health check configuration next to circuit breaker disable, which the AST test checks for.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes symptoms (crash on None path, TypeError on len, AttributeError on shuffle) without prescribing specific code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (ds.dataset is None, len returns 0, load doesn't crash) and only AST-check for disable_health_check = True assignment, which is the natural way to disable it.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests exec data_source.py code, instantiate RolloutDataSource, call __len__ and load(); only the ray/rollout.py test uses AST due to missing deps.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert specific behavior like ds.dataset is None after construction with prompt_data=None, len()==0, and load() not raising; a stub that always crashes or returns wrong values would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All four behaviors described (constructor, __len__, load shuffle, health check) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and labeled with [pr_diff]/[repo_ci] tags.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but not exact lines; localization within files still required.
